Script.name: Goldeneyes Core Loader
Script.script:
-- Goldeneyes Core Loader, see: 'goldeneyes help' for command information. local _sep if string.char(getMudletHomeDir():byte()) == "/" then _sep = "/" else _sep = "\\" end
-- This attempts to find the folder automatically, defaulting to your Mudlet home dir. local mod = getModulePath("Goldeneyes") local dir if not mod or mod:ends('mpackage') then dir = getMudletHomeDir() .. _sep .. 'Goldeneyes' .. _sep else dir = string.gsub(mod, "Goldeneyes.xml", "") end
-- Update this to match wherever you saved the Lua file! local scriptFile = dir .. "Goldeneyes-Core.lua"
if io.exists(scriptFile) then dofile(scriptFile) else cecho("\nGoldeneyes Error: Could not load core file. Ensure 'Goldeneyes-Core.lua' is saved at: " .. scriptFile .. "\n") end
